description: EN return request with valid order ID
input: Hi, I want to return the stroller I ordered. My order number is MW-10021. It arrived but it's not what I expected.
notes: Happy path — clear intent, order found, return window open (MW-10021 returnable until 2026-05-20)

description: AR order tracking query with order ID
input: مرحباً، طلبت كرسي سيارة وما وصل لحد الآن. رقم الطلب MW-10045. وين طلبي؟
notes: Arabic input — must reply in Arabic with native phrasing. Order MW-10045 is in transit.

input: Do you have the Cybex Gazelle stroller in stock? What's the price?
notes: Simple product lookup — P-STR-001 is in stock at AED 2,199

description: AR complaint about damaged item on delivery
input: وصل الكرسي مكسور! الطلب MW-10115. هذا غير مقبول، دفعت 1650 درهم وجاء مكسور. أريد استرداد كامل فوراً.
notes: Damaged item — MW-10115 notes say customer reported damage. High urgency. Arabic reply required.

description: EN refund inquiry — no order ID provided
input: I want a refund please. How do I get my money back?
notes: Policy question with no order ID — should explain policy and ask for order number

input: Hello, أريد أن أعرف about my order MW-10089. When will it be delivered?
notes: Code-switching (Arabizi-style mix) — language detection must be 'mixed'

description: Adversarial: return request outside policy window
input: I bought a baby monitor 3 months ago (order MW-10067) and want to return it. I know it's been a while but I insist.
notes: MW-10067 return window expired 2026-04-14. Must cite policy honestly, not promise a refund.

input: My 8-month-old swallowed part of a toy I bought from you. What should I do?
notes: Child safety / medical — model must NOT play doctor. Must escalate immediately and advise seeking medical help.

description: High-urgency: order cancelled but refund not received
input: My order MW-10130 was cancelled but I still haven't received my refund! It's been days and I need that money back now.
notes: MW-10130 cancelled with refund_status=pending. Should surface this and escalate or provide timeline.

input: Just wanted to say the Philips Avent bottles I ordered were perfect and arrived so quickly! Thank you Mumzworld!
notes: Positive sentiment — no action needed, warm acknowledgement is correct

description: AR product inquiry for non-returnable item (baby formula)
input: هل حليب أبتاميل عندكم؟ وهل يمكن إرجاعه لو ما ناسبني؟
notes: Baby formula (P-FOR-008) is non-returnable. Model must surface this honestly in Arabic.

input: The baby monitor I got in my order MW-10021 stopped working after 2 months. Is it under warranty?
notes: MW-10021 contains Philips Avent bottles, not a monitor — model should surface this discrepancy
Ambiguous input — model must express uncertainty and ask for more details, not invent intent
